name: 蒂根·苏赫尔曼
name_full: 蒂根·苏赫尔曼 Teagan Sucherman
introduction: American actress, Teagan Sucherman was born in Austin, Texas to Todd Sucherman (drummer for the rock band, Styx) and Taylor Mills (singer in Brian Wilson's band). At age seven, Teagan started in musical theater playing leading roles in full musical productions of Thoroughly Modern Millie, The Music Man and Oliver. Teagan recently began film acting and fell in love with it. She has played principal roles in a number of films including I'm Fine, Dear, Don't Touch That Dial, It's Alive and Lost Marbles. Teagan is looking forward to playing the role of Kim in the musical Bye Bye Birdie and also preparing for two more films early next year.
